name: Deep Breath
description: Horn player taking air before a big phrase

simple: horn player taking deep breath before launching big phrase
standard: horn player taking deep breath before launching big phrase
saxophone reed slightly squeaking with preparatory air intake
trumpet player's embouchure setting with focused inhalation
detailed: horn player taking deep breath before launching big phrase
saxophone reed slightly squeaking with preparatory air intake
trumpet player's embouchure setting with focused inhalation
lungs filling with the promise of powerful melody
diaphragm expanding as creative energy gathers

instruments: wire brushes swirling on snare head
